title: What accountability actually looks like
caption:
Most guys in "accountability" are in a performance group.

One man who knows your actual sin, knows your name, and will call you at 9 PM when something's wrong — that's the rarer thing. That's what James was talking about: real brotherhood, not a weekly check-in where everyone shows up cleaned up.

Confession is just the beginning. Healing takes two men who've decided to stick. And if you want that kind of brother, you have to become the kind of man someone can actually call.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

Save this and send it to the brother who shows up.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #accountability #james516 #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship
